column1: 言われるままに動いていては、自分の意見がなくなる。
column2: いわれるままにうごいていては、じぶんのいけんがなくなる。
column3: If you move only as you are told, you lose your own opinion.
column4: 〜れるままに (do as one is told, in compliance with, as led by)
column6: describes passively following whatever one is told or led to do; complying without resistance
column8: 受動形+ままに = passive compliance with direction; ままに① = as one pleases (active freedom); 言われる通りに = as told (neutral); 言いなりに = at someone's beck and call
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:verb-passive-ままに source:authored scaffold:pending-audio source:shin-kanzen frequency:top5k complexity:standard
